name: @leanish/agent-atc
description: agent-atc — ask-the-code (ATC) backend, the phase-1 Layer-3 agent for codebase Q&A. Built on @leanish/agent-runtime.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -b && chmod +x dist/bin/atc-dev-publish.js
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:integration
scripts.smoke:local: ATC_DEV_CONSUMER_SECRET=${ATC_DEV_CONSUMER_SECRET:-local-dev} node dist/bin/atc-dev-publish.js --question 'smoke test' --include-all | node ../agent-runtime/dist/bin/agent-runtime.js run-local --agent-config ./agent.yaml --fake-runner --log-level error
scripts.lambda:build: npm run lambda:build:base && docker build -f Dockerfile -t atc-lambda:rehearsal ..

devDependencies-comment: EventBridge + SQS + catalogit pulled in via @leanish/agent-runtime at runtime; declared explicitly only for integration-test code that constructs SDK clients directly.
